COMPENDIUM-MERGER.App.Title: Compendium Merger
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.App.ScopeHint: Merges Item and Actor compendiums, and only Items/Spells/Monsters/Vehicles for now — Item feats/classes/subclasses/backgrounds/species and Actor characters/groups are left alone and skipped. Merged Items are sorted into Weapons/Armor/Equipment/Consumables/Tools/Loot/Containers folders, Merged Spells into a folder per spell level, and Merged Monsters into a folder per Challenge Rating. Merged Vehicles aren't sorted into folders yet.
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.App.NoSources: No Item or Actor compendiums are available. Enable some under your world's Compendium Packs settings first.
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.App.PriorityHint: Each row is a top-level Compendium folder — every Item and Actor compendium underneath it is included, no matter how many sub-folders deep. Check the ones to merge and order them by priority: if the same name shows up under more than one checked folder, the one closer to the top wins. Compendiums with no parent folder are grouped under "(No Folder)". Drag isn't supported — use the arrows to reorder.
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.App.RebuildWarning: Running the merge completely wipes and rebuilds the "Merged Items", "Merged Spells", "Merged Monsters", and "Merged Vehicles" compendiums from your checked sources. Any manual edits made directly inside those compendiums will be lost — edit the sources instead, then re-run.
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.App.MergeComplete: Merge complete: {items} items, {spells} spells, {monsters} monsters, {vehicles} vehicles.
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.Warnings.NoSourcesChec: Check at least one source folder before running the merge.
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.Warnings.MergeFailed: The merge failed — check the browser console (F12) for details.
